# Locked Visual System

Brand defaults (handle, accent, voice, mascot) live in **`BRAND.md`** at the project root — edit
that one file to rebrand. **The look is defined by the images in the `_reference-style/` folder
(project root) — swap those to change the style.** The tokens below are the shipped Eric Tech
default (grass/sky world); the default accent comes from `BRAND.md`.

## The world (constant on every slide — generated by GPT Image 2)
- Bright blue sky + soft white clouds; a green grass strip along the bottom.
- Voxel / Minecraft-style **"Clawd"** mascot as host, posed per slide (sometimes a tiny gold crown
  = "the boss"). Same character every slide.
- Cream / off-white **paper cards**: wooden signs on posts, pinned notes, speech bubbles.
- Sunny, cheerful 3D-render aesthetic. Soft shadows, gentle depth of field.

## Type (composited by Pillow, never generated)
Fonts bundled in `assets/fonts/` (OFL, redistributable):
- **Headlines** → `Archivo` Black/Bold. Tracking −0.03…−0.05em. Color = slide text or accent.
- **Subhead / body / bullets** → `Space Grotesk` (400–600).
- **Labels / "REPO 01" / URLs** → `JetBrains Mono`, ~11–13px, UPPERCASE, 0.12em tracking, muted.

## Color tokens
| Token | Hex |
|---|---|
| bg / white | `#FFFFFF` |
| surface | `#F8FAFC` |
| border | `#E2E8F0` |
| text | `#0F172A` |
| text-muted | `#475569` |
| **accent (default)** | **`#2BAADF`** |
| purple (secondary) | `#8B5CF6` |
| teal (secondary) | `#14B8A6` |
| card cream | `#F4EEE2` |

Per-slide accent overrides the default from `tool-brand-colors.md` (the featured tool's brand color).

## Layout grid (1080×1350)
- **Safe margins:** all text ≥ 80px from every edge.
- **Bottom danger zone:** keep critical copy out of the **bottom ~420px** (IG overlays username,
  caption preview, and the like/comment/share buttons there). Chrome (handle, "swipe →") may live
  there but nothing load-bearing.
- **Handle** (`@…`) bottom-left, `JetBrains Mono`, muted.
- **Pill badge** top (e.g. "START HERE", "01/5", "FREE GUIDE") — rounded, cream, thin border.
- **"swipe →" / "save this post"** bottom-right on cover / CTA.

## Chrome per slide type
- **cover:** big number/hook headline, optional badge, `swipe →`, crowned Clawd.
- **item:** "0k/N" badge, card with headline + "which means" subhead + ≤3 bullets + URL line,
  featured logo, open-loop tail near the bottom of the card.
- **howto:** 3 mini-cards / signposts, one step each.
- **cta:** speech-bubble card, the comment/DM line, `save this post`.
